label: C++: Build and Run
command: mkdir -p build && g++ -std=c++17 src/*.cpp -I include -o build/main && ./build/main

label: WIN: C++: Build and Run
command: if (!(Test-Path build)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path build }; g++ -std=c++17 (Get-ChildItem src/*.cpp) -I include -o build/main.exe; if ($?) { ./build/main.exe }
